message:
fix(window): detect window functions nested in wrapper expressions (#95) + 10 tests

expr_has_window_function() didn't recurse into FunctionCall args, so
ROUND(AVG(val) OVER (...), 2) was misrouted to the aggregate path
returning 1 row instead of per-row window results.

Added FunctionCall/CASE recursion to expr_has_window_function(), plus
extract_inner_window_function/replace_window_with_placeholder/
substitute_placeholder_value helpers and WrappedWindow ColKind variant
so nested window calls are properly computed then fed back through the
outer expression.

Added 10 conformance tests (s205-s214): derived tables, complex WHERE
logic, UPDATE with CASE, CREATE TABLE AS SELECT, DROP/recreate,
unicode text, transactions/rollback, savepoints, window ROW_NUMBER/
RANK/DENSE_RANK, compound SELECT with CTE. 553 pass, 0 fail, 2 ignored.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
